title.zh: 精密塑胶注塑与模具一站式方案

subtitle.en: From mold design to mass production, Heanxin delivers custom injection parts, insert molding and hardware-plastic combined components for OEM / ODM customers.
subtitle.zh: 从模具设计到批量生产，禾安鑫为 OEM / ODM 客户提供定制注塑件、嵌件注塑及五金塑胶组合件。

desc.en: Mold development, injection molding and assembly under one roof.
desc.zh: 模具开发、注塑成型与组装一体化。

desc.en: Full-process inspection from incoming material to shipment.
desc.zh: 从来料到出货的全流程检验。

desc.en: Flexible customization for global brands and buyers.
desc.zh: 为全球品牌与买家提供灵活定制。

title.zh: 值得信赖的塑胶制造伙伴

body.en: Heanxin specializes in plastic injection molding, mold development and hardware-plastic combined parts. We support customers from product idea and DFM analysis through to tooling, mass production and quality assurance.
body.zh: 禾安鑫专注于塑胶注塑、模具开发与五金塑胶组合件，协助客户从产品构想、可制造性分析，到模具开发、批量生产与品质保证的全流程落地。

title.en: Real Product Views Across Custom Manufacturing Categories
title.zh: 覆盖多类定制制造场景的真实产品图

subtitle.en: Most custom projects begin with enclosures, industrial plastic components or insert-molded metal-plastic parts. See whether your product fits these common entry points.
subtitle.zh: 多数定制项目从外壳、工业塑胶零部件或五金塑胶嵌件成型件开始。您可以先判断产品是否属于这些常见入口。

subtitle.en: A clear path helps buyers understand what information to prepare and where manufacturing decisions are made.
subtitle.zh: 清晰流程能帮助客户了解需要准备哪些资料，以及关键制造决策在哪些阶段完成。

desc.en: Review drawings, samples, material needs and quantity.
desc.zh: 评审图纸、样品、材料要求和预计数量。

desc.en: Confirm manufacturability, tooling direction and cost.
desc.zh: 确认可制造性、模具方向和成本。

desc.en: Build the mold, trial mold and verify samples.
desc.zh: 制作模具、试模并验证样品。

desc.en: Move into stable injection molding and process control.
desc.zh: 进入稳定注塑生产和过程管控。

desc.en: Inspect, assemble, pack and ship the order.
desc.zh: 检验、组装、包装并完成出货。

desc.en: Practical production knowledge for custom plastic projects.
desc.zh: 面向定制塑胶项目的实际生产经验。

desc.en: Supports small and medium plastic parts across multiple industries.
desc.zh: 支持多行业中小型塑胶件生产需求。

desc.en: From drawings and samples to mold development and production.
desc.zh: 从图纸、样品到模具开发与量产交付。

desc.en: Tooling, injection molding, hardware matching and assembly.
desc.zh: 模具、注塑、五金配套与组装一体化。
